fatigue.rated_life_note: EVQ-P7 series 100k cycle minimum; 200k for low-force options
fatigue.contact_stress_note: Dome operating force ~1.6 N is within EVQ-P7 rated operating-force envelope; cycling below rated stroke and force keeps dome contact stress under the metal-dome fatigue limit (qualitative).

value_legend.[DATASHEET]: anchored to Panasonic EVQ-P7 datasheet/family page
value_legend.[ASSUMED]: derived/assumed engineering value for EVT planning
